rationale: The doc contradicts itself: the proof sketch claims a single `simp` closes the goal citing `List.length_append` itself as a simp lemma (circular), while the detailed proof does induction. It also omits the mandatory specification structure.
rubric_evidence: Single tactic `simp` discharges the goal — the simp lemmas `List.length_append`, `List.length_cons`, `Nat.add_succ` close it in one step.
By induction on `l₁`: ... rewrite with `List.cons_append`, `List.length_cons`, then apply the induction hypothesis. Use `Nat.succ_add` to align.
